name: Filet Mignon with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the mushrooms and sauté in 3 tablespoons of butter.
2. Add the flour and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Blend well. Stir in warm cream.
4. Keep the sauce well-heated, in a separate skillet.
5. Sauté the filets in hot butter for 2-1/2 minutes per side (for rare).
- For medium-rare interior, sauté for 3 minutes per side.
6. Sauté bread slices in 6 tablespoons of butter, turning often to prevent the butter from being absorbed.
7. Arrange the bread slices in a ring on a well-heated platter.
8. Place the filets on top and arrange the mushroom sauce in the center.
9. Stir the scotch into the pan juices, boil for a minute or two, and spoon the sauce over the meat.
10. Additional sauce can be passed separately.
11. Serves 6.
